arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A kicks off 2025, a crucial clash awaits at the Stadio Artemio Franchi as Fiorentina host league co-leaders Napoli on Saturday evening. This match presents Napoli with a golden opportunity to claim sole possession of first place, while Fiorentina aim to halt their recent slide and reignite their own title aspirations. arts.ttl: Napoli secure Meret’s contract extension: Details revealed
arts.sum: Alex Meret's future with Napoli has been settled as the Italian goalkeeper is set to extend his stay with the Partenopei. The 27-year-old shot-stopper, whose current contract was due to expire in June 2025, has agreed to new terms with the club after prolonged negotiations.
